# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Uploader
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Enqueue scripts and styles
function user_file_uploader_enqueue_scripts() {
    if (is_user_logged_in() && is_account_page()) { // Assuming this is used on an account page or similar user-specific page
        wp_enqueue_style('user-file-uploader-style', plugins_url('style.css', __FILE__));
        wp_enqueue_script('user-file-uploader-script', plugins_url('script.js', __FILE__), array('jquery'), null, true);
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'user_file_uploader_enqueue_scripts');

// Create the directory if it doesn't exist
function user_file_uploader_create_directory() {
    $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
    $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
    if (!file_exists($user_files_dir)) {
        wp_mkdir_p($user_files_dir);
    }
}
add_action('plugins_loaded', 'user_file_uploader_create_directory');

// Handle file uploads
function user_file_uploader_handle_upload() {
    if (isset($_POST['user_file_uploader_nonce']) && wp_verify_nonce($_POST['user_file_uploader_nonce'], 'user_file_uploader_action')) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('You must be logged in to upload files.');
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        $user_files_url = $upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files';

        if (!empty($_FILES['user_upload_file']['name'])) {
            $file = $_FILES['user_upload_file'];
            $file_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
            $file_tmp_name = $file['tmp_name'];
            $file_error = $file['error'];
            $file_size = $file['size'];

            // Define allowed file types and max size
            $allowed_types = array(
                'jpg' => 'image/jpeg',
                'jpeg' => 'image/jpeg',
                'png' => 'image/png',
                'gif' => 'image/gif',
                'pdf' => 'application/pdf',
                'doc' => 'application/msword',
                'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
                'txt' => 'text/plain',
                'rtf' => 'application/rtf',
            );
            $max_file_size = 5 * MB_IN_BYTES; // 5 MB

            $file_ext = strtolower(pathinfo($file_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
            $file_mime_type = mime_content_type($file_tmp_name);

            if ($file_error !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                // Handle different upload errors
                switch ($file_error) {
                    case UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE:
                    case UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE:
                        wp_die('The uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size.');
                        break;
                    case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE:
                        wp_die('No file was uploaded.');
                        break;
                    case UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL:
                        wp_die('The file was only partially uploaded.');
                        break;
                    case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR:
                        wp_die('Missing a temporary folder.');
                        break;
                    case UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE:
                        wp_die('Failed to write file to disk.');
                        break;
                    case UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION:
                        wp_die('A PHP extension stopped the file upload.');
                        break;
                    default:
                        wp_die('An unknown upload error occurred.');
                        break;
                }
            }

            // Check file extension and MIME type
            if (!in_array($file_ext, array_keys($allowed_types)) || !in_array($file_mime_type, $allowed_types)) {
                wp_die('Invalid file type. Allowed types: ' . implode(', ', array_keys($allowed_types)));
            }

            // Check file size
            if ($file_size > $max_file_size) {
                wp_die('File is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.');
            }

            // Generate a unique file name to prevent overwrites and security issues
            $new_file_name = md5(uniqid(rand(), true)) . '.' . $file_ext;
            $destination = $user_files_dir . '/' . $user_id . '_' . $new_file_name;
            $destination_url = $user_files_url . '/' . $user_id . '_' . $new_file_name;

            if (move_uploaded_file($file_tmp_name, $destination)) {
                // Save file info to user meta
                $uploaded_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', true);
                if (!is_array($uploaded_files)) {
                    $uploaded_files = array();
                }

                $uploaded_files[] = array(
                    'filename' => $file_name,
                    'new_filename' => $user_id . '_' . $new_file_name,
                    'url' => $destination_url,
                    'type' => $file_mime_type,
                    'size' => $file_size,
                    'upload_date' => current_time('mysql'),
                );
                update_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', $uploaded_files);

                // Optionally redirect to prevent re-submission
                wp_redirect(add_query_arg('upload_success', '1', wp_get_referer()));
                exit;
            } else {
                wp_die('There was an error moving the uploaded file.');
            }
        } else {
            // No file uploaded but form submitted
            wp_redirect(add_query_arg('upload_error', 'no_file', wp_get_referer()));
            exit;
        }
    }
}
add_action('admin_post_user_file_upload', 'user_file_uploader_handle_upload');
add_action('admin_post_nopriv_user_file_upload', 'user_file_uploader_handle_upload'); // For non-logged-in users if needed, though requirement is membership site

// Shortcode to display the upload form and user's uploaded files
function user_file_uploader_shortcode() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return '<p>Please log in to upload files.</p>';
    }

    $user_id = get_current_user_id();
    $output = '';

    // Display upload messages
    if (isset($_GET['upload_success']) && $_GET['upload_success'] == '1') {
        $output .= '<div class="user-file-uploader-success">File uploaded successfully!</div>';
    } elseif (isset($_GET['upload_error'])) {
        $error_message = 'An error occurred during upload.';
        if ($_GET['upload_error'] === 'no_file') {
            $error_message = 'Please select a file to upload.';
        }
        $output .= '<div class="user-file-uploader-error">' . esc_html($error_message) . '</div>';
    }

    // Upload Form
    $output .= '
    <div class="user-file-uploader-section">
        <h3>Upload New File</h3>
        <form action="' . esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php')) . '" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="user_file_upload">
            ' . wp_nonce_field('user_file_uploader_action', 'user_file_uploader_nonce', true, false) . '
            <p>
                <label for="user_upload_file">Select File:</label><br>
                <input type="file" name="user_upload_file" id="user_upload_file" required>
            </p>
            <p>Allowed types: Images (JPG, PNG, GIF), PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, RTF. Maximum size: 5MB.</p>
            <p>
                <input type="submit" value="Upload File" class="button button-primary">
            </p>
        </form>
    </div>';

    // Display User's Uploaded Files
    $uploaded_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', true);

    if (!empty($uploaded_files) && is_array($uploaded_files)) {
        $output .= '<div class="user-file-uploader-section">
            <h3>Your Uploaded Files</h3>
            <table class="user-file-list">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Filename</th>
                        <th>Type</th>
                        <th>Size</th>
                        <th>Upload Date</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>';
        foreach ($uploaded_files as $key => $file) {
            $file_url = esc_url($file['url']);
            $file_name = esc_html($file['filename']);
            $file_type = esc_html($file['type']);
            $file_size = size_format($file['size']);
            $upload_date = esc_html(date_i18m('Y-m-d H:i', strtotime($file['upload_date'])));

            $output .= '
                    <tr>
                        <td><a href="' . $file_url . '" target="_blank">' . $file_name . '</a></td>
                        <td>' . $file_type . '</td>
                        <td>' . $file_size . '</td>
                        <td>' . $upload_date . '</td>
                        <td>
                            <form action="" method="post" class="delete-file-form">
                                <input type="hidden" name="user_file_delete_action" value="1">
                                <input type="hidden" name="file_key" value="' . esc_attr($key) . '">
                                ' . wp_nonce_field('user_file_delete_nonce', 'user_file_delete_nonce_field', true, false) . '
                                <button type="submit" class="button button-small delete-file-button">Delete</button>
                            </form>
                        </td>
                    </tr>';
        }
        $output .= '
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>';
    } else {
        $output .= '<div class="user-file-uploader-section"><p>You have not uploaded any files yet.</p></div>';
    }

    return $output;
}
add_shortcode('user_file_uploader', 'user_file_uploader_shortcode');

// Handle file deletion
function user_file_uploader_handle_delete() {
    if (isset($_POST['user_file_delete_action']) && isset($_POST['user_file_delete_nonce_field']) && wp_verify_nonce($_POST['user_file_delete_nonce_field'], 'user_file_delete_nonce')) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('You must be logged in to delete files.');
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $file_key = intval($_POST['file_key']);

        $uploaded_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', true);

        if (is_array($uploaded_files) && isset($uploaded_files[$file_key])) {
            $file_to_delete = $uploaded_files[$file_key];
            $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
            $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
            $file_path = $user_files_dir . '/' . $file_to_delete['new_filename'];

            if (file_exists($file_path)) {
                unlink($file_path); // Delete the actual file from the server
            }

            unset($uploaded_files[$file_key]); // Remove from array
            $uploaded_files = array_values($uploaded_files); // Reindex array
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', $uploaded_files);

            wp_redirect(add_query_arg('delete_success', '1', wp_get_referer()));
            exit;
        } else {
            wp_redirect(add_query_arg('delete_error', '1', wp_get_referer()));
            exit;
        }
    }
}
add_action('template_redirect', 'user_file_uploader_handle_delete');

// Basic CSS for styling (style.css in plugin root)

    margin-top: 0;

    background-color: #f8d7da;

    padding: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;

    font-weight: bold;

    background-color: #f9f9f9;

    background-color: #dc3232;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 0.9em;

?>
